Name: geometry_consistent_landmarks
Title: Can geometry-aware training improve consistency of dental landmark prediction?
Experiment: Compare the baseline landmark model against a variant that adds simple geometric consistency constraints or decoding rules. Test whether these changes reduce unstable landmark predictions on ambiguous or partially occluded teeth.

Name: uncertainty_for_ambiguous_landmarks
Title: Does uncertainty estimation help identify unreliable dental keypoint predictions?
Experiment: Add a lightweight uncertainty estimate or confidence score for predicted landmarks and evaluate whether low-confidence predictions correspond to hard cases such as overlap, blur, or missing structure. This tests whether the model can support safer downstream tooth analysis.
